channel.title: GitHub ABAP Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of ABAP in GitHub

item.title: SAP-samples/fiori-elements-opensap
item.description: This repository offers optional hands-on exercises for the free openSAP course "Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps."

item.title: sapmentors/abap2xlsx
item.description: Generate your professional Excel spreadsheet from ABAP
